top_signals: Israel kills Intelligence Minister Khatib overnight — 4th senior official assassinated (Larijani, Soleimani, Khatib, Basij cmdr)
Iran retaliates with cluster warheads on Tel Aviv — 2 killed, IRGC claims 100+ targets hit
4 blasts in Erbil, Iraqi Kurdistan — near US consulate and coalition base, Kataib Hezbollah demands US withdrawal
Israeli strike hits judiciary site in Larestan, Fars province — staff and civilians killed
Hormuz selective reopening: only 21 tankers transited since war began. China-linked vessels get safe passage
Kabul hospital death toll 400 from Pakistan airstrike — Taliban warns all-out war retaliation
Putin-Trump phone call TODAY (March 18) to discuss Ukraine — first direct contact since Iran war started
Iraq resumes limited oil exports via Kirkuk-Ceyhan pipeline (250k bpd) — bypassing Hormuz blockade
Israel destroys 10-storey building in central Beirut — evacuation orders for 50 villages in South Lebanon
EU/NATO allies reject Trump's Hormuz coalition request — Trump says US doesn't need them

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: STABLE (Day 24): ZERO ceasefire signals in active war theaters. Israel escalates with judiciary site strikes in Fars. Iran retaliates with cluster warheads. Pakistan kills 400+ in Kabul hospital. Putin-Trump call TODAY is Ukraine-focused, not ME. Hormuz remains effectively closed (21 tankers in 18 days). Oil crisis deepens. All alliances fracturing — NATO rejects Hormuz coalition. Only de-escalatory signal: Iraq resumes Kirkuk-Ceyhan pipeline, bypassing Hormuz.

latest_news.headline: Israel kills Intelligence Minister Khatib — 4th senior Iranian official eliminated
latest_news.text: IDF confirms killing Intelligence Minister Esmail Khatib in overnight strikes. Fourth senior official killed in 48hrs (Larijani, Soleimani, Khatib, Basij cmdr). IDF striking Basij positions around Tehran.

latest_news.headline: Iran retaliates with cluster warheads on Tel Aviv — 2 killed
latest_news.text: IRGC fires cluster munitions at Tel Aviv in retaliation. 2 killed. IRGC claims 100+ targets hit. Mojtaba Khamenei rejects ceasefire proposals.

latest_news.headline: Hormuz 'gravest oil supply disruption in history' — 21 tankers in 18 days
latest_news.text: CNBC: Iran's de facto blockade 'gravest disruption to global oil supply in history.' 21 tankers in 18 days vs 100+/day pre-war. China-linked vessels get selective passage. US bombed Kharg Island military sites.

latest_news.headline: Pakistan Kabul airstrike kills dozens — global ceasefire calls (Bloomberg)
latest_news.text: NYT: Pakistani airstrike on Kabul drug rehab center killed dozens. Deadliest single attack of escalating conflict. Bloomberg reports global alarm. US backs Pakistan's 'right to self-defense.' No ceasefire path.

latest_news.headline: Putin-Trump call TODAY on Ukraine — first contact since Iran war started
latest_news.text: Putin-Trump phone call March 18 to discuss ending Ukraine war. Lavrov rejects any settlement without all territorial demands. Iran war draining US bandwidth from Ukraine.

latest_news.headline: 4 explosions in Erbil near US consulate — Kataib Hezbollah demands US withdrawal
latest_news.text: 4 blasts in Erbil, Iraqi Kurdistan. Coalition air defenses intercepted. Kataib Hezbollah demands all foreign soldiers leave Iraq.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 24, 12:04 UTC) — War Day 24. ESCALATION CONTINUES: (1) Israel kills 4th senior Iranian official (Intelligence Minister Khatib); (2) Iran retaliates with cluster warheads on Tel Aviv; (3) 4 blasts in Erbil near US assets — Kataib Hezbollah demands US withdrawal; (4) Hormuz 'gravest oil supply disruption in history' per CNBC — only 21 tankers in 18 days, China gets selective passage; (5) US bombed Kharg Island military sites; (6) Pakistan Kabul airstrike kills dozens — NYT/Bloomberg confirm, global ceasefire calls but no diplomatic track; (7) Putin-Trump call TODAY on Ukraine; (8) Lavrov rejects settlement; (9) Mojtaba Khamenei rejects all ceasefire proposals. ZERO ceasefire signals in active war theaters.
